title: hedera helix f. arborea
intro: Hedera helix f. arborea, also known as the English ivy tree or topiary English ivy, is a cultivar of the evergreen woody climbing plant, Hedera helix. This plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Hedera helix f. arborea include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
